causalAutopsy.notes: INSTAR-Bench v2 defect-class review (2026-07-02, Class 1) surfaced a latent prompt-parser drift (tone gate taught B15, parser accepts only B15_CONTEXT_DEATH_STOP). This ships the report-only inventory + shared contract library; the per-callsite contract tests + render refactor are deferred behind the A/B gate.
